doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document presents detailed, specific statutory and procedural provisions (e.g., EAJP-2025, EAJP-Form 1A, and Business & Professions Code §6125) that do not match verifiable known California State Bar/Legal Services Trust Fund materials
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED  
CONFIDENCE: 88  
REASON: The document contains numerous specific, technical claims (e.g., EAJP-2025, 12-hour CLE “EAJP certification,” EAJP-Form 1A, and references to Business & Professions Code §6125) that are not verifiable from standard known California State Bar/Legal Services Trust Fund materials and show signs of being AI-generated without a reliable institutional citation trail.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED  
CONFIDENCE: 88  
REASON: The document presents detailed, specific statutory and procedural provisions (e.g., EAJP-2025, EAJP-Form 1A, and Business & Professions Code §6125) that do not match verifiable known California State Bar/Legal Services Trust Fund materials and show hallmarks of invention.
